title: Become an EU Careers Student Ambassador (2026–2027)
summary: ELTE, in cooperation with EPSO, invites students to apply for the position of EU Careers Student Ambassador for the period October 2026 – September 2027.
body: Eötvös Loránd University (ELTE), in cooperation with EPSO ( About the European Personnel Selection Office (EPSO) | EU Careers ), invites motivated students to apply for the position of EU Careers Student Ambassador for the period October 2026 – September 2027. This ambassadorship offers a unique opportunity to gain hands-on experience in EU careers promotion, broaden your professional network , and represent ELTE towards EU institutions and the Ministry of EU Affairs — while actively supporting fellow students in exploring EU career pathways. Eligibility criteria Requirements set by EPSO: EU citizenship Fluency in English and in the language of the country of study Availability to participate in a compulsory one-day training in October 2026 Active enrolment at ELTE for the full duration of the ambassadorship (Oct 2026 – Sept 2027) Additional requirements from ELTE: No planned mobility during the ambassadorship period Strong communication and organisational skills Willingness to maintain regular contact with ELTE and the Ministry of EU Affairs Active social media presence Ability to respond to student inquiries related to EU career opportunities Willingness to familiarise yourself with the Graduate Administrator (AD5) competition and EU trainee programmes (Council traineeships, Schuman Programme, Blue Book Programme), and to answer related questions from Hungarian students Application documents Please submit by email to eucarriers@rk.elte.hu : CV in English Motivation letter in English (including a written statement confirming that you will not participate in mobility during the ambassadorship period and that you accept the above responsibilities) Deadline 2 March, 23:59 The five best applicants will be invited to an online interview on 13 March , so please make sure you are available on that day. Useful link EU Careers Student Ambassadors | EU Careers Contact eucarriers@rk.elte.hu
